prompt: High-fashion editorial portrait of a European woman in her early 20s, positioned centrally and standing perfectly still amid a moving crowd. She maintains direct eye contact with the camera, her expression calm, stoic, and emotionally distant. Motion-blurred pedestrians drift around her as abstract dark blue-grey silhouettes, heavily defocused to emphasize isolation and contrast. The background is a minimal charcoal-black fog gradient with subtle atmospheric depth and delicate back rim lighting outlining her figure. Captured on an 85mm lens at f/1.2 for ultra-shallow depth of field, dramatic cinematic compression, and extreme separation from the surroundings. Color grading features deep crushed blacks, cool cyan-tinted shadows, balanced natural skin tones, and subtle anamorphic lens characteristics. Premium campaign-level fashion photography with a refined editorial art direction, cinematic atmosphere, and sophisticated visual storytelling. Vertical composition, close-up portrait framing.
